content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed branch delta (src/adapters/worktree.rs, tests/unit/checkpoint_test.rs, and the result symlink removal) against fork point ca4d23414de261e5b7d9716c8c608569045ab18d. Part A correctly filters both tracked+gitignored paths (via `ls-files -z -i -c --exclude-standard` against the temporary index) and assume-unchanged paths (via `ls-files -z -s -v` against the real index, which is the right scope since `read-tree` does not carry assume-unchanged bits into the temporary index), then removes them via `update-index --force-remove` on the temporary index only. Byte-oriented parsing (`OsStr::from_bytes` on Unix, NUL splitting, `splitn(2, b'\t')`) correctly handles non-UTF8 paths and paths with embedded tabs. Part B is complete: `result` is untracked and `git ls-files -i -c --exclude-standard` on this branch is empty. Test coverage is strong and includes edge cases (tab-in-path, non-UTF8, .git/info/exclude, core.excludesFile, post-`rm --cached`, reset-to-checkpoint). No correctness, safety, or robustness issues worth fixing now; no new beads to propose.

## Amendments

None.
